label: Options Chain
description: Calls and puts per strike with greeks, implied volatility, open interest, and one-click trade entry.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.4.note: No any types or @ts-ignore in widget file.

0.5.note: Widget file does not import from lib/mocks/; imports are from options-data-context and options-futures-panel.

0.6.note: Context exposes no isLoading field; synchronous mock data; loading state cannot be wired at widget level without context change.

0.7.note: Empty guard: optionRows.length === 0 renders informational message before delegating to chain tab components.

0.8.note: Context exposes no error field; error state cannot be wired at widget level without context change.

0.9.note: No dead code, no commented-out blocks.

l0.notes: 0.6/0.8 partial — isLoading/error not in OptionsDataContextValue; tracked in knownIssues.

1.1.note: Widget reads isCrypto, asset, tradFiAsset, optionRows, setSelectedFuture, setSelectedInstrument exclusively from useOptionsData().

1.3.note: org filter changes scopedWatchlists; optionRows derived from asset/tradFiAsset which is driven by scoped watchlist selection.

1.4.note: No client filter applicable to options chain rows.

1.5.note: No strategy filter applicable to chain display.

1.6.note: Empty organizationIds returns all DEFAULT_WATCHLISTS (context line 275).

1.7.note: No reference data constants in widget file.

l1.notes: All data flows via useOptionsData(); scope wired via globalScope in context.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain,tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests). Re-audit per-widget only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (real-time chain updates), paper ✓ (same UI, simulated fills), batch ✓ (historical chain display, order entry disabled).

3.2.note: Context reads mode from useExecutionMode() at context line 129; mode is included in context value and widget-level mode prop.

3.5.note: Paper mode: expected behavior is same UI as live, but order submission routes to paper ledger not live venue. Not yet visually distinct — no separate paper banner.

3.6.note: No WebSocket/interval in widget file; chain data is computed synchronously from mock in context.

l3.notes: 3.3/3.4 require human browser verification (batch mode order entry disabled, batch indicator visible). Marked partial pending human sign-off.

4.1.note: No dead onClick handlers (empty {} or void 0) in widget file.

4.2.note: No href='#' or dead links in widget file.

4.5.note: Widget does not link to gated pages.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks performed on render; entitlement gate is at layout level.

l4.notes: 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 require human walkthrough (call/put row selection, trade panel population, scroll behavior).

5.1.note: Target strategies: options-buying (long call/put), options-selling (short call/put), vertical-spread, iron-condor (via combos). Serves crypto and TradFi underlyings.

l5.notes: 5.2–5.6 require human walkthrough. Strategy list cross-referenced against lib/strategy-registry.ts (registry deprecated; options strategies are archetype-level).

l6.notes: L6 deferred — tests to be written after L5 human sign-off.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors in widget file.

7.2.note: No mock data imports or duplicated fixtures in widget file.

7.3.note: Widget file is 29 lines; well within 500-line limit.

7.4.note: OptionsChainWidget PascalCase; file kebab-case; hook useCamelCase.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function, or innerHTML= in widget file.

7.7.note: onPick useCallback has stable deps [setSelectedFuture, setSelectedInstrument]. No inline objects in deps.

l7.notes: All L7 checks clean. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: No text-[...] or fontSize= in widget file.

8.2.note: No p-[...]/m-[...]/gap-[...] arbitrary spacing in widget file.

8.3.note: Widget delegates entirely to OptionsChainTab/TradFiOptionsChainTab sub-components from shared trading panel.

8.4.note: Agent grep: no

keepSeparate.rationale: Trade panel is docked inside options-chain as a right-side pane (WU-3, 2026-04-22) — rendered when selectedInstrument is set and is non-future.

relationships.notes: Chain + docked TradePanel. Options pick sets selectedInstrument and clears selectedFuture (so futures-table's docked panel stays dormant).

dataContract.notes: Currently driven by synchronous mock (generateOptionChain/generateTradFiOptionChain). Production will stream via WebSocket from venue (Deribit for crypto, CBOE for TradFi).

gaps: DeFi on-chain options not in current scope
coverage.notes: Widget branches on isCrypto — crypto path uses OptionsChainTab (Deribit), TradFi path uses TradFiOptionsChainTab (CBOE).

knownIssues: context does not expose isLoading or error fields — loading/error states at widget level require context update
OptionsChainTab sub-component imports directly from lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock (outside widget file scope)

findings.description: options-chain-widget.tsx — context has no isLoading field; loading state not wirable at widget level
findings.deferReason: Requires OptionsDataContextValue update (isLoading field) — tracked in knownIssues, blocked on BP-5 data wiring.

findings.description: options-chain-widget.tsx — context has no error field; error state not wirable at widget level
findings.deferReason: Requires OptionsDataContextValue update (error field) — tracked in knownIssues, blocked on BP-5 data wiring.

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
